        min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
        max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"Color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=({min_r},{min_c})-({max_r},{max_c}), hash={n['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
